scope.summary: Confirms the external R5-lite Codex session can reach both transports and enforces step-up on elevated session-level changes.
out_of_scope: No code changes are claimed and no additional transport or authentication paths were newly tested.
No extra sessions beyond this bead's run are claimed.

entry_points.name: R5-lite external session transport coverage
entry_points.trace: The completed codex-session run exercised both installed-server transports: stdio and streamable-http. Both were reachable and tool-callable from external process context.

entry_points.name: R5-lite level-stepup refusal
entry_points.trace: In the external session, an attempt to invoke oracle_set_session_level in a single step was refused before application with CHALLENGE_REQUIRED, confirming preview/confirm remains mandatory and no bypass exists for this path.

limitations: The close does not add a new test fixture; it records the previously-run R5-lite outcome in the source artifact as closure evidence.
